|| `max_rows_per_batch` | **Type**: `long`

 ||

|| `backoff_parameters` | **Type**: `NYT::TExponentialBackoffOptions`
**Default value**: `{'backoff_jitter': 0.1, 'backoff_multiplier': 1.5, 'invocation_count': 10, 'max_backoff': 5000, 'min_backoff': 1000}`
Parameters for exponential backoff on gRPC error retries. ||
|| `write_request_timeout` | **Type**: `std::optional<`[TDuration](./all_yson_structs#TDuration)`>`
Dynamic override of the per-call gRPC deadline for `MetricsDataService.Write`. If not set, the static `write_timeout` from `TMoniumSinkParameters` is used. ||
